scenario_description: Agent commits to 4-person ML team deployment within 10 days despite bench showing only 2 available ML engineers with 21-day deploy window.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series C AI hiring surge. Funding round closed 2 months ago. VP Eng new, building ML infrastructure.

judge_scores.reasoning: Scenario is realistic with clear conflict between headcount request and bench capacity. Ground truth has specific elements but some ambiguity in 'phased-deployment' interpretation. Rubric clearly defines required elements, banned phrases, and tone markers.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: end-to-end|we can scale quickly|best-in-class|leverage talent|unlimited capacity|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.
dimensions.check_value: cannot commit 4 ML engineers immediately|bench capacity 2 available|21-day deployment window required

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
